name: Skills Scanner
description: Security scanner for OpenClaw Skills to detect potential threats
author: pwddd

scanDirs.description: List of directories to scan for Skills

behavioral.description: Enable behavioral analysis (slower but more accurate)

policy.description: Scanning policy: strict (more false positives) / balanced (recommended) / permissive (may miss threats)

preInstallScan.description: Enable pre-installation scanning (monitors directories for new Skills)

onUnsafe.description: Action to take when unsafe Skill is detected: quarantine / delete / warn (recommended)

injectSecurityGuidance.description: Inject Skills security guidance into system prompt (requires AI to scan before installing Skills)
